message.content:
@startuml
title RqP – Request Resource

actor "Requesting Party\n(RqP)" as RqP

box "Client Application (CA)\n«Custom Application»" #lightgreen
participant "User Interface" as UI
end box

box "Resource Server (RS)\n«Custom Application»" #lightorange
participant "REST API" as RS_API
database "Resource" as Resource
database "Credential" as Credential
end box

box "Authorization Server (AS)\nForgeRock Access Manager" #lightorange
participant "AM API" as AM_API
participant "UMA API" as UMA_API
participant "OAuth API" as OAuth_API
end box

box "Content Server (CS)\n«Custom Application»" #lightcyan
participant "REST API" as CS_API
database "Data" as Data
end box

RqP -> AM_API : Authenticate
RqP <-- AM_API : Authenticated

RqP -> UI : Access Interface

note right of UI : Obtain Resource Id\n(maybe from Discover Resources)

UI -> RS_API : GET /share/resources/{resourceId}\nscopes (no valid RPT)

RS_API -> Resource : Get _id
RS_API <-- Resource : meta data

RS_API -> Credential : Get PAT
RS_API <-- Credential : PAT

note left of RS_API : Get permission ticket for the\nresource and scope

RS_API -> UMA_API : POST /am/uma/permission_request\nresource_id + scopes
RS_API <-- UMA_API : permission ticket

UI <-- RS_API : permission ticket + AS URI

UI -> UI : Get client auth basic

note left of UI : Get claim token for the\nRequesting Party (RqP)

UI -> AM_API : POST /am/oauth2/access_token\nscope=openid\nSSO session

AM_API -> CS_API : Validate SSO session
AM_API <-- CS_API

UI <-- AM_API : claim token

note left of UI : Get Requesting Party Token (RPT)\nusing the permission ticket\nand claim token

UI -> AM_API : POST /am/oauth2/access_token\ngrant_type=urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:uma-ticket\nscope=..., ticket=..., claim_token=..., claim_token_format=...

AM_API -> UMA_API : Check Access

note right of UMA_API : No Policy for RqP + Resource + scopes\nCreate Access Request for Resource Owner

AM_API <-- UMA_API : No Access, request Submitted

UI <-- AM_API : Error: Request Submitted

RqP <-- UI
@enduml
